attractions.name: Badami Cave Temples
attractions.description: An exquisite complex of 6th-century rock-cut caves featuring sculptures of Shiva, Vishnu, and Jain Tirthankaras. Beautifully carved pillars, dramatic cliffside locations, and sweeping views make this a rewarding but time-intensive visit
